# G7 FP Fixture: Q1-Q4 answered only via subsection headings

## Scope Challenge

### Q1: Does this need to exist?

This work is necessary. Without it the process is manual and error-prone.

### Q2: Name 3 real consumers

The analytics team, the billing service, and the partner integration layer
all depend on this capability today.

### Q3: Cost of inaction

Staying with the status quo costs two engineer-days per week in workarounds.

### Q4: Barbell option

Either build the minimal slice (one sprint) or the full platform (one quarter);
no middle ground delivers proportional value.
